creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
A day in the life of a travel blogger 🫣   Shoutout to the KLM staff who made sure everybody who had connecting flights knew exactly where to go in Schiphol. I ended up waiting for quite a while at my departure gate so I could probably just have walked 😂🥲   Newcastle has surprised me quite a bit! Yep, it rained here on my first day and that obviously isn’t ideal, but I kind of like the vibe it’s giving the medieval parts of the city - I’ve especially enjoyed checking out The Cathedral and the Newcastle Town Walls 🙌   Looking forward to exploring more of Newcastle and the North East of England 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿

Let me know in the comments if you’ve got any suggestions for this part of Britain 🤝

#newcastle #lovegreatbritain #travellife

transcription.text: Today I'm solo traveling from Copenhagen to England with a very short layover in Amsterdam, so I really don't need this guy telling me that we're gonna be 30 minutes delayed. But I ended up beating the world record in airport track running in Amsterdam, so I reached Newcastle and went straight to this former Dominican friary that is now a restaurant. Airports in, Maximo Park on full volume and then it was time to check out this indoor market in the city center where I got a canny good double espresso. By the way guys, why is there a Danish flag in Newcastle Cathedral? I'm all for it and look how bloody beautiful this place is, but why? I went to an area called Ouseburn which looked like the proper place to be if you're a cool kid, but I'm just not a cool kid, so I checked into my hotel, had a surprisingly good steak and went straight to bed.
